_comment: Odoo web/tooling fallback prettier config (tier-3 only). Values recovered from odoo/addons/web/tooling/_prettierrc.json (v15-v16) and inline prettier/prettier rule in _eslintrc.json (v17-v19). tabWidth=4, printWidth=100 are canonical across all versions. Used ONLY when no repo-committed .prettierrc and no Odoo checkout with tooling/ is locatable.
